hierarchy.h1: text-4xl sm:text-5xl lg:text-6xl tracking-tight leading-none font-light
hierarchy.h2: text-2xl sm:text-3xl lg:text-4xl tracking-tight leading-snug font-normal
hierarchy.label: text-xs tracking-[0.2em] uppercase text-gray-400 font-semibold

typography.custom_rules: Avoid using regular sans-serif for massive hero text. Use Cormorant Garamond for cinematic impact. Always apply tracking-tight to headings.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous Spacing, Mobile-first, Asymmetrical touches for marketing sections.

grids.marketing: grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-8 lg:grid-cols-12 gap-8 to gap-12

motion_and_interaction.hover_states: Soft lift (-translate-y-1), increased gold glow, border color transition to primary.
motion_and_interaction.page_transitions: Framer motion fade in and slide up (y: 20, opacity: 0 -> y: 0, opacity: 1).
motion_and_interaction.fluid_shader: Use react-three-fiber or WebGL liquid distortion for the hero background or palette visualizer to simulate organic resin waves.
motion_and_interaction.rules: Avoid bouncy animations. Use smooth, easing transitions suitable for luxury (ease: [0.22, 1, 0.36, 1]).

components_strategy.navigation: Crystal glassmorphism sticky header (z-50). Visible links on desktop.

buttons.primary: bg-[#D4AF37] text-black hover:bg-[#E5C365] transition-colors font-medium rounded-sm px-6 py-3
buttons.outline: border border-[#D4AF37]/50 text-[#D4AF37] hover:bg-[#D4AF37]/10 rounded-sm px-6 py-3

components_strategy.cards: Cardless or sharp rectangular edges (rounded-sm max 4px). Avoid heavy Vercel-like rounded borders.
components_strategy.forms: Shadcn based but customized to dark luxury: bg-[#1A1A1A] border-white/10 text-white focus:border-[#D4AF37] focus:ring-[#D4AF37]/20.

image_urls.description: Cinematic macro photography of dark luxury liquid epoxy resin, glowing golden swirls mixing with deep black.
Elegant epoxy resin wall clock, black and gold resin art.
Luxury epoxy resin serving tray, black marble and gold flakes.
Elegant epoxy resin geode art piece, deep black and sparkling gold crystals.

instructions_to_main_agent: Rebuild the application using React and Tailwind CSS in a modular way.
Implement the 'Dark Luxury' theme. Do NOT use generic purple or standard SaaS blue. Rely on #0A0A0A base, #141414 surface, and #D4AF37 gold accents.
Use Framer Motion for premium hover effects, transitions, and cinematic reveals. Add a soft glow effect (`shadow-[0_0_30px_rgba(201,164,74,0.25)]`) to active or premium elements.
Implement real piece preview functionality using the provided mockup images (clock, tray, geode).
Integrate a fluid shader or animated liquid background in the Hero and Visualizer sections, simulating organic resin flow.
Ensure the UI layout uses generous spacing and sharp, high-end rectangular aesthetics (avoid overly rounded 'bubbly' cards).
Make sure forms and calculators (proportions, pricing) use customized Shadcn components matching the luxury dark theme.
Ensure mobile responsiveness with full-width cards and accessible, larger buttons.
